office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Jim Walsh faces challenger Kevin Moynihan.

candidates.summary: Walsh is an incumbent representative, publisher, and House Republican leader emphasizing fiscal restraint, parental rights, public safety, rural industry, and limits on mandates.
highlights: Supports lower taxes and spending, parental rights, public safety, and limits on state mandates [S2].

experience.basis: He is an incumbent legislator and House Republican leader.

local-control.basis: His emphasis on limiting state mandates aligns with local control.

candidates.summary: Moynihan is a challenger emphasizing affordability, labor and working families, health care, education, housing, and reproductive rights.
highlights: Supports working families and reproductive rights [S2].

experience.basis: The dossier identifies him as a challenger and documents no prior elected tenure.
